name: AdOff 25 - Intelligent Approval Gate (Gemini + LLM Scoring)
description: Auto-approval gate con Gemini Flash scoring per draft caption_social/ad_copy/landing_section/email_drip. Schedule 10min scansione auto-approve (score>=threshold), 30min dispatch approvati -> posts_queue. Webhooks manuali per override umano. Metric: daily auto_approve_rate tracker.

parameters.query: SELECT id, workflow, asset_type, platform, lang, body, created_at FROM adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts WHERE status = 'draft' AND brand_guard_ok = true AND approval_score IS NULL AND asset_type IN ('caption_social', 'ad_copy', 'landing_section', 'email_drip') ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 20

parameters.jsCode:
// Load auto_approve_threshold from env (default 90)
return [{ json: { threshold: parseInt(process.env.ADOFF_AUTO_APPROVE_THRESHOLD || '90') } }];

parameters.query: UPDATE adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts SET status = $1::text, auto_approved = $2::boolean, approval_score = $3::int, approved_at = NOW(), approved_by = 'gemini-flash-auto', brand_guard_reason = $4::text WHERE id = $5::bigint
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts SET status = $1::text, approved_at = NOW(), approved_by = $2::text WHERE id = $3::bigint

SELECT id, workflow, asset_type, platform, lang, status, body, created_at FROM adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts WHERE ($1::text IS NULL OR status = $1::text) AND ($2::text IS NULL OR workflow = $2::text) AND ($3::text IS NULL OR asset_type = $3::text) AND ($4::text IS NULL OR lang = $4::text) ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT $5::int OFFSET $6::int

SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts WHERE ($1::text IS NULL OR status = $1::text) AND ($2::text IS NULL OR workflow = $2::text) AND ($3::text IS NULL OR asset_type = $3::text) AND ($4::text IS NULL OR lang = $4::text)
UPDATE adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts SET status = 'approved', approved_at = NOW(), approved_by = $1::text WHERE id = ANY($2::bigint[])
SELECT id, workflow, asset_type, platform, lang, body, status FROM adoff_autopilot.gemini_copy_drafts WHERE status = 'approved' AND published_at IS NULL ORDER BY approved_at ASC LIMIT 50

parameters.responseBody: ={{ { ok: true, draft_id: $json.draft_id, status: $json.action, message: 'Draft ' + $json.action + ' successfully' } }}
={{ { ok: true, count: $json.count, message: $json.count + ' draft(s) approved successfully' } }}
